2026-04-14T19:26:52.9427020Z description: |
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9427636Z   Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9428672Z   Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9429678Z   predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9436807Z   analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9437895Z   Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9438572Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9438720Z on:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9439063Z   issues:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9439418Z     types: [opened]
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9439838Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9440573Z     inputs:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9440934Z       issue_number:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9441695Z         description: "Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)"
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9442608Z         required: true
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9443024Z         type: string
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9443416Z   roles: all
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9443784Z   reaction: eyes
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9444012Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9444188Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9444448Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9444660Z network:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9445013Z   allowed:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9445363Z     - defaults
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9445761Z     - "api.nuget.org"
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9446031Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9446197Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9446598Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9447102Z   add-labels:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9447458Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9447805Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9448182Z   remove-labels:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9448552Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9448898Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9449255Z   add-comment:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9449610Z     max: 2
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9449951Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9450497Z   assign-to-user:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9450882Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9451223Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9451593Z   close-issue:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9451962Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9452297Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9452667Z   noop:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9453037Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9453485Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9453823Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9454989Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9456305Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9456807Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9457376Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9457765Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9458156Z       inputs:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9458520Z         message:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9459157Z           description: "The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols"
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9459977Z           required: true
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9460557Z           type: string
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9460954Z         owners:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9462007Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9463525Z           required: true
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9463965Z           type: string
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9464376Z       steps:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9464872Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9465423Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9465961Z           env:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9466587Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9467410Z           with:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9467777Z             script: |
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9468217Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9468872Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9469380Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9469583Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9519281Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9530821Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9531479Z                 }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9532129Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9533046Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9533769Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9534262Z                 }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9534650Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9535104Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9535327Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9535564Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9536441Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9537079Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9537500Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9537691Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9539581Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9589618Z                 return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9590306Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9590599Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9590809Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9591532Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9592189Z                 try {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9592671Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9593349Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9594021Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9594603Z                   });
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9595086Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9595779Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9597393Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9598584Z                   });
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9599021Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9599785Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9601075Z                 }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9601488Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9602003Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9602230Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9602401Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9602995Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9603637Z                 return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9604037Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9604440Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9605207Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9605950Z                 return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9606346Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9606589Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9606760Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9607479Z               try {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9608092Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9608998Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9609773Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9610783Z                 return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9611203Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9611439Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9611753Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9612559Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9613317Z                 return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9613718Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9613931Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9614366Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9615233Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9615945Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9616655Z                 return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9617068Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9617282Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9617464Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9618284Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9619300Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9620179Z                   return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9620605Z                 }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9620829Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9621024Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9621577Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9622081Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9622596Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9623096Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9623655Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9624356Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9625210Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9626025Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9626561Z                   })
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9626970Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9627314Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9627502Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9628240Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9629000Z                   return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9629415Z                 }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9629646Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9629824Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9630612Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9631295Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9631695Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9631851Z                 try {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9632339Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9633056Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9633737Z                     body
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9634154Z                   });
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9634995Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9636002Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9636795Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9637649Z                   return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9638062Z                 }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9638432Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9638647Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9638801Z tools:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9639135Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9639486Z   github:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9639832Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9640696Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9641560Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9642476Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9643166Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9643437Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9643612Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9643994Z ---

2026-04-14T19:26:52.9667503Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"

2026-04-14T19:26:52.9669307Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9669857Z       permissions:

2026-04-14T19:26:52.9677617Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9678148Z           env:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9678760Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9679548Z           with:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9679911Z             script: |
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9680477Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9681130Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9681637Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9681836Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9682686Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9683579Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9684118Z                 }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9684711Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9685558Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9686190Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9686663Z                 }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9687039Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9687477Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9687691Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9687933Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9688570Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9689170Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9689565Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9689751Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9691679Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9693441Z                 return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9693842Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9694064Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9694257Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9694919Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9695532Z                 try {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9695998Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9696657Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9697299Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9697861Z                   });
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9698339Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9699024Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9700554Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9701673Z                   });
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9702124Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9702864Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9703601Z                 }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9704006Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9704523Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9704747Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9704918Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9705500Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9706137Z                 return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9706540Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9706951Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9707686Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9708414Z                 return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9708804Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9709024Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9709195Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9709652Z               try {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9710546Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9711336Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9712186Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9713068Z                 return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9713471Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9713688Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9713985Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9714776Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9715429Z                 return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9715823Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9716043Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9716467Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9717305Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9717979Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9719303Z                 return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9719700Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9719935Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9720457Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9721290Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9722295Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9723017Z                   return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9723436Z                 }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9723663Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9723857Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9724423Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9724916Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9725431Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9725916Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9726458Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9727182Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9728009Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9728810Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9729343Z                   })
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9729735Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9730224Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9730413Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9731148Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9731883Z                   return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9732301Z                 }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9732522Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9732710Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9733361Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9734039Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9734408Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9734560Z                 try {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9735050Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9735734Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9736334Z                     body
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9736755Z                   });
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9737550Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9738498Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9739283Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9740233Z                   return;
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9740661Z                 }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9741031Z               }
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9741254Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9741401Z tools:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9741754Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9742102Z   github:
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9742453Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9743014Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9744004Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9744834Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9745613Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9745884Z 
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9746048Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9746681Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9747485Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (6762 chars):
2026-04-14T19:26:52.9815367Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues\n  Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,\n  predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides\n  analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links\n  Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository\n\non:\n  issues:\n    types: [opened]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      issue_number:\n        description: \"Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)\"\n        required: true\n        type: string\n  roles: all\n  reaction: eyes\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork:\n  allowed:\n    - defaults\n    - \"api.nuget.org\"\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  add-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  remove-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  add-comment:\n    max: 2\n    target: \"*\"\n  assign-to-user:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  close-issue:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    mention_owners:\n      description: \"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      output: \"Owner mention comment posted\"\n      permissions:\n        issues: write\n      inputs:\n        message:\n          description: \"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n        owners:\n          description: \"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n      steps:\n        - name: Post mention comment\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const fs = require('fs');\n              const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;\n\n              function resolveIssueNumber() {\n                if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {\n                  return context.issue.number;\n                }\n                const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);\n                if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {\n                  return parsed;\n                }\n                return null;\n              }\n\n              const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();\n              const owner = context.repo.owner;\n              const repo = context.repo.repo;\n\n              if (issueNumber === null) {\n                core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              async function failSafe(reason) {\n                core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.addLabels({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    labels: ['needs-team-triage']\n                  });\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'\n                  });\n                } catch (recoveryError) {\n                  core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);\n                }\n                core.setFailed(reason);\n              }\n\n              if (!outputFile) {\n                await failSafe('No agent output path provided');\n                return;\n              }\n              if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {\n                await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              let agentOutput;\n              try {\n                agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));\n              } catch (parseError) {\n                await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {\n                await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');\n              if (items.length === 0) {\n                await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              for (const item of items) {\n                if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {\n                  await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const mentions = item.owners\n                  .split(/[\\s,]+/)\n                  .map(s => s.trim())\n                  .filter(Boolean)\n                  .map(raw => {\n                    const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\\\?@/, '');\n                    if (/\\r|\\n/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    return `@${normalized}`;\n                  })\n                  .filter(Boolean);\n\n                if (mentions.length === 0) {\n                  await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const body = item.message\n                  ? `${item.message}\\n\\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`\n                  : mentions.join(' ');\n\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body\n                  });\n                  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);\n                } catch (apiError) {\n                  await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);\n                  return;\n                }\n              }\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues]\n    # Triage must read issues from all users, including external\n    # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the\n    # auto-applied \"approved\" policy filters them out via DIFC\n    min-integrity: none\n\ntimeout-minutes: 10"}
